headline: Airbnb and 6 Other Stocks to Buy That Can Thrive Even if Interest Rates Don’t Fall
summary: Federal Reserve rate cuts have been a casualty of the war with Iran as oil prices rise.  22V Research’s Dennis DeBusschere screened for companies that sit in that sweet spot.  The former stand to rise the most as those data points show growth.
